title: Cobblemon Better Type Icons
description: Replaces the original Cobblemon circular type icons with sleek diamond-shaped ones, and adds a thicker outline to them.
body:
![Row of new type icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6076ea9e253ef180079af487fd64ffafc03c613a.png)

Replaces the original Cobblemon circular type icons with sleek diamond-shaped ones. Both the party summary (big) and PC (small) icons have been edited.

Feel free to use in any modpack.

![Example of new icons in the party summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d0db01c4a204f04a0c833cae7f37b10959cf152.png)

![Example of new icons in the PC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ebc599b6e83bfef2ce76fb64cdb603441b33f3a.png)
